channel.title: Congressional Job Tracker
channel.description: Aggregating employment opportunities across the U.S. Congress

item.title: Green & Gold Congressional Aide - U.S. House
item.description: Office: House Support Offices | Location: Pittsburgh, PA

item.title: Summer Law Clerk - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs - Republicans | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | The U.S. Senate Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations office of Chairman Ron Johnson (R-WI) is seeking law clerks for the summer of 2026. The position offers law students the opportunity to gain ex...

item.title: Administrative Manager - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Confidential | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | Midwest Republican Senator seeks an Administrative Manager to join their administrative team in Washington, D.C. This position handles the role of systems administrator; serves as intern and page coor...

item.title: Oversight Counsel - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions - Republicans | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | Senate HELP Committee Republican Staff is seeking an experienced oversight and investigations counsel. Job responsibilities include initiating and managing oversight and investigations projects, draft...

item.title: State Press Secretary - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Cory A. Booker | Location: Newark, NJ | Affiliation: Democratic | Senator Cory A. Booker (D-New Jersey) seeks a State Press Secretary for his Newark, New Jersey office. The ideal candidate has experience working directly with members of the media, particularly those...

item.title: Legislative Assistant (Judiciary, Economy) - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Brian Schatz | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | Senator Brian Schatz seeks a legislative assistant to staff the senator’s work on judiciary-related topics (including antitrust, civil rights, criminal justice, gun control, immigration, intellectual...

item.title: Select Committee on Ethics Financial Disclosure Specialist - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Select Committee on Ethics - Non-designated | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Nonpartisan | The Select Committee on Ethics seeks a Financial Disclosure Specialist to assist with the Committee’s Financial Disclosure program. Responsibilities include but are not limited to: delivering guidance...

item.title: Stars of Valor Fellow – Senator Ron Johnson - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Stars of Valor Fellowships Program | Location: Milwaukee, WI | Affiliation: Nonpartisan | The Senate has established the Stars of Valor Fellowships Program for wounded and disabled veterans; family members of Armed Forces servicemembers who die in the line of duty or veterans who die of se...

item.title: Auditor / Senior Auditor - U.S. House
item.description: Office: House Support Offices | Location: Washington, DC

item.title: Director of Scheduling - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Kirsten E. Gillibrand | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | The Office of Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand seeks a Director of Scheduling to manage the her daily and long-term schedules in DC and New York. This person will report to the Deputy Chief of Staff, supervise...

item.title: Legislative Correspondent - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Confidential | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | Midwest Republican member of the Senate Agriculture Committee is seeking a Legislative Correspondent to handle constituent correspondence and provide legislative support on agriculture, energy, enviro...

item.title: Digital Outreach Coordinator - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Kirsten E. Gillibrand | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | The Office of U.S. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand seeks a Digital Outreach Coordinator to be based in her Washington, DC office. This is a new position that will coordinate communication to constituents a...

item.title: Press/Digital Assistant - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Brian Schatz | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | The Office of U.S. Senator Brian Schatz seeks a Press and Digital Assistant to join an active communications team. Responsibilities include but are not limited to: producing high-quality digital media...

item.title: Legislative Assistant - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Confidential | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | Senior Republican Senator seeks Legislative Assistant in the Washington, DC office with a focus on health care and education policy. Responsibilities include monitoring legislation in assigned portfol...

item.title: Speechwriter - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Elissa Slotkin | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | The Office of Senator Elissa Slotkin is seeking an experienced Speechwriter to serve in the Washington, DC office. The Speechwriter will be responsible for drafting written remarks for Senator Slotkin...

item.title: Legislative Correspondent/Legislative Aide - U.S. Senate

item.description: Office: Confidential | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Republican | Senior Republican member seeks a highly-motivated and experienced Legislative Assistant to advise on economic and/or domestic policy issues. Candidates should have strong communication, research, and...
